name: Livepeer
description: Livepeer — decentralized video transcoding network built on Ethereum

seo.title: Livepeer — Object Storage / Media API
seo.meta_description: Livepeer: Livepeer — decentralized video transcoding network built on Ethereum

when_to_use: Decentralized video transcoding at lower cost than cloud APIs
Streaming video on open-source infrastructure with ETH economics
Transcoding NFT video content on decentralized compute
Web3-native video pipeline for blockchain-based media apps
Building OTT apps on Livepeer's community-run video network

pros: Open protocol, not locked to one vendor
Managed Livepeer Studio SDK is dev-friendly
Active OSS community and Ethereum roots
cons: Less mature tooling than Mux/Cloudflare Stream
Compliance story trickier for regulated sectors
review.verdict: Cheapest transcoding per minute if you tolerate decentralized quirks — Mux if you want boring-reliable.
review.best_for: Cost-sensitive UGC platforms and web3 apps willing to trade polish for price.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage/metered billing scales up and down.
